name: Sunday Worship Experience
prompt: Design a vibrant, modern church flyer for a Sunday worship service. Use warm earth tones with gold accents. Include space for multiple speakers at the top with their photos.

name: Revival Worship Service
prompt: Create a professional, elegant church flyer for a revival service. Use deep blue and gold colors. Design should be sophisticated and inviting.

name: Youth Ministry Event
prompt: Design a vibrant, energetic youth ministry flyer. Use bright, modern colors. Include multiple speaker spots for youth leaders.
